prediction.reasoning: Using a random walk model with volatility estimation based on typical large-cap stock behavior. Assumed annualized volatility of ~25% for GE. For 20-day horizon, applied geometric Brownian motion with log-normal distribution of returns. Point estimate assumes no drift (efficient market). Confidence intervals calculated using standard deviations scaled by square root of time (20/252 trading days) and normal distribution quantiles.
